creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 179082
bsd.xorg.mk patch

Originally, I had added an xfont2 entry, but that same change was already committed so what remains is the other cleanup I did at the same time.

* Add install-strip to the driver category so that every driver need not set INSTALL_TARGET separately
* Remove redundant USE_XORG entries from the server category, it's easier to keep the whole list in the server master port
* whitespace changes to fix alignment
